sections.intro: At PlayOnCourt, we are committed to protecting your privacy and ensuring a secure experience for all users.

dataCollection.title: 1. Information We Collect
dataCollection.content: We collect information you provide directly to us, such as your name, email address, profile picture, and playing preferences when you create an account.

dataUsage.title: 2. How We Use Your Information
dataUsage.content: We use your information to facilitate matches, track your performance, and improve our services. We do not sell your personal data to third parties.

security.title: 3. Security
security.content: We implement industry-standard security measures to protect your data from unauthorized access or disclosure.

sections.contact: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at support@playoncourt.com.

acceptance.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.content: By accessing or using PlayOnCourt, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service.

userConduct.title: 2. User Conduct
userConduct.content: Users agree to behave respectfully towards other players and club staff. Harassment or inappropriate behavior will not be tolerated.

accountability.title: 3. Accountability
accountability.content: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account information.

hero.subtitle: Discover the ultimate platform for Tennis, Padel, and Pickleball. Find matches, book courts, and manage your club all in one place.

1.title: Find Matches Instantly
1.desc: Connect with players of your skill level and organize matches with ease.

2.title: Compete & Rank Up
2.desc: Join local tournaments, track your stats, and climb your club's leaderboard.

3.title: Club Management
3.desc: Powerful tools for club owners to manage courts, billing, and members.

sections.intro: At PlayOnCourt, we respect your right to privacy and the control over your personal data. Following the GDPR and platform provider regulations (like Facebook), we provide you with a clear way to request the deletion of your information from our systems.

howTo.title: 1. How to Request Deletion
howTo.content: To delete your account and all associated data, you can do so directly within the mobile app in the 'Profile Settings' section. Alternatively, you can send an email to our support team.

dataRemoved.title: 2. What Data is Removed
dataRemoved.content: Upon processing your request, we will permanently delete your profile information, match history, and any personalized settings associated with your account ID.

retention.title: 3. Data Retention
retention.content: Please note that some information (like payment records) may be retained for a limited period if required by law or for legitimate financial auditing purposes.

sections.contact: To initiate a manual deletion request via email, please contact us at support@playoncourt.com with the subject 'Data Deletion Request'.
